contents.text: The Mining skill is leveled up by mining stone and cobblestone. As the level increases, the bonus drop chance per mined block also increases.

As the level increases, the bonus drop chance per mined block also increases. At a certain level threshold, additional cobblestone drops spawn from the Mining Bonus Loot Table.
 
The corresponding tool is the Element Pickaxe – it further increases the drop multiplier:
• Common: +50% Drop-Chance
• Uncommon: +100%
• Rare / Epic / Legendary / Mythic: further enhancements
 
Blueprints for upgrades drop when leveling up.
Players who are far behind the server leader automatically receive more XP per action. More information in the Catch-Up System tab.
